//: Project-scope settings for job-hunt-system. Universal hooks (linear-priorities, repo-touch-*) fire from ~/.claude/settings.json — see Me/CLAUDE_UNIVERSAL_USAGE_PATTERNS.md in alex-agents-skills. This file is reserved for project-specific hook registrations.
//disable_override_pattern: To silence a user-scope hook in this project only, add to .claude/settings.local.json (NOT this file): {"hooks":{"disable":["linear-priorities"]}}. settings.local.json is project-local user state; settings.json is committed.
